```{r}
#| label: state-decomposition-setup
#| include: false
options(warn = 2)                                    # promote any chunk warning to a render error (gate-critical)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})
targets::tar_source()                                # plot theme + compact Figure 10 helper
targets::tar_load(state_decomposition_figures)       # compact gene-effect leaf only
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())

sdf <- state_decomposition_figures
```

::: {.figure-wide-inline .figure-print-block}

<h2 class="figure-heading">Figure 10</h2>

```{r}
#| label: plot-state-decomposition
#| fig-width: 18.8
#| fig-height: 12.2
#| fig-alt: "Three-panel microglial state-response plate: replicate DAM occupancy; two transcriptome-wide state-difference maps plotting paired DAM-minus-Homeostatic amyloid-response effects against mean response in MAPTKI and P301S backgrounds, with direct 95% confidence intervals for supported declared markers; and 48 gene-level factorial small multiples connecting Homeostatic and DAM amyloid-response estimates across the two tau backgrounds with 95% confidence intervals."
state_decomposition_figure_plot(sdf)
```

:::
